test-case.description: should reject files without .json or .xml extension
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.Parameter Validation.should reject files without .json or .xml extension

test-case.description: should read and expand JSON configuration
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.JSON File Processing.should read and expand JSON configuration

test-case.description: should expand environment variables in nested JSON objects
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.JSON File Processing.should expand environment variables in nested JSON objects

test-case.description: should expand environment variables in JSON arrays
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.JSON File Processing.should expand environment variables in JSON arrays

test-case.description: should preserve unexpanded variables in nested JSON values
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.JSON File Processing.should preserve unexpanded variables in nested JSON values

test-case.description: should preserve non-string value types in JSON
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.JSON File Processing.should preserve non-string value types in JSON

test-case.description: should read and expand XML configuration
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.XML File Processing.should read and expand XML configuration

test-case.description: should throw for invalid JSON content
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.Error Handling.should throw for invalid JSON content

test-case.description: should throw for invalid XML content
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.Error Handling.should throw for invalid XML content

test-case.description: should throw for empty JSON files
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.Error Handling.should throw for empty JSON files

test-case.description: should expand deep nested JSON and preserve null and primitive values
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.JSON Edge Cases.should expand deep nested JSON and preserve null and primitive values

test-case.description: should return config even with -Test parameter
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.Test Parameter.should return config even with -Test parameter

test-case.description: should report nested path for unexpanded variables
test-case.name: Get-ExpandedConfig.Test Parameter.should report nested path for unexpanded variables
Get-ExpandedConfig.Pipeline Support.should accept ConfigFilePath via pipeline
